series_metadata.series_description: Records contain Full Time Equivalent (FTE) reports submitted by all 88 Ohio counties, using the JFS 04234. The reports are used by the Ohio Department of Job and Family Services (ODJFS) to complete part of the federal OCSE-157, which is an annual report based on the federal fiscal year (October 1 through September 30) and submitted to the U. S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) at the end of the federal fiscal year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years and 3 years in the records center, then destroy provided state and federal audits are completed and released, and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
